title: Approve Device
subtitle: Enter the user code displayed on your device to authorize it.
approved: Device successfully approved. You may close this page.

error.invalid: The code you entered is invalid or missing. Please check and try again.
error.not-found: The code was not found or is unrecognized. Please verify the code.
error.already-approved: This device has already been approved.
error.expired: The code has expired. Please restart the device authorization flow.
error.unauthorized: You are not authorized to approve this device. Please sign in and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
